records.ety: [L. juxta near + positio position: cf. F. juxtaposition. See Just, v. i., and Position.]

defs: A placing or being placed in nearness or contiguity, or side by side; as, a juxtaposition of words.
quotes: Parts that are united by a a mere juxtaposition.
Juxtaposition is a very unsafe criterion of continuity.
